title: Pulled Beef Tacos
instructions: Place the beef chuck into the slow cooker.
Add the rest of the ingredients into the slow cooker.
Mix everything around and turn the beef chuck to coat it well.
Take the beef chuck out and shred it.
Put the shredded beef back into the slow cooker for 30 minutes.
Pull the beef out and place it into a separate bowl.
(Optional) Use the leftover sauce from the slow cooker to soak the tortillas.
(Optional) Pan-fry the soaked tortillas, then apply the meat and some cheese.
Serve with tomatoes, sour cream, and avocado.
